name: io.github.seob5285-alt/x402-facilitator-proxy
description: Open, multi-tenant HTTP 402 infrastructure gateway and stdio MCP server for x402-powered machine payments. Features automated programmatic platform splits, an Express.js middleware gate, and buyer-agent templates for LangChain (TS) and CrewAI (Python) to execute USDC micropayments on Base L2. No signup required.
